betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The quirks of reality. The messiness that echoes of an ordered law.
The art of intuiting the law from the messiness, of working with the messiness to discover... the truth of nature.
A truth that may reveal, or a truth that may deny.
But a truth, nevertheless.
In the moment of discovery, in the act of measurement, nature reveals itself, as it is, not as we believe it to be.
The strength to be willing to accept this truth, the humbleness to admit, to yield.
Because reality is...
It is!
And because it is, it is worth knowing!
The curiosity of the Arbiter, missing, but now being brought back.
